---
title: 'H1: Correlation_between_appearance_involvement_and_physical_distress_analysis'
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-24"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)

d_rednote <- read.csv('../data/RedNote_Survey.csv')
```


# Calculate descriptive statistics for key variables
```{r}
d_rednote %>%
  summarise(
    # Statistics on the frequency of appearance-related activities
    Appearance_Activity_M = round(mean(Appearance_Activity_Total), 2),
    Appearance_Activity_SD = round(sd(Appearance_Activity_Total), 2),
    Appearance_Activity_Mdn = round(median(Appearance_Activity_Total), 2),
    Appearance_Activity_Range = paste(min(Appearance_Activity_Total), "-", max(Appearance_Activity_Total)),
    
    # Statistics on the degree of body intention distress
    BSQ8A_M = round(mean(BSQ8A_Total), 2),
    BSQ8A_SD = round(sd(BSQ8A_Total), 2),
    BSQ8A_Mdn = round(median(BSQ8A_Total), 2),
    BSQ8A_Range = paste(min(BSQ8A_Total), "-", max(BSQ8A_Total))
  )
```
